provenance.measured_date: act_bytes_per_token_layer, optimizer_bytes_per_param, and overhead_frac are placeholders pending measured calibration. naive_loss_bytes_per_nv is an empirical fit (2026-07-03) to one production-shape benchmark artifact (n=8192, V=151936, D=4096, bf16); it does not extrapolate linearly to smaller n, where it deliberately over-predicts -- the conservative, safe direction for this planner.
